_description: Drop ONE entry into your MCP client to auto-wire all arifOS constitutional tools. Pick the transport that matches your setup.

arifos-remote._comment: RECOMMENDED — Zero install. Connects to live arifOS MCP over HTTPS.
arifos-remote._use_when: You want to use arifOS without installing anything. Just add this entry.

arifos-local._comment: Local stdio via pip install. Run: pip install arifos
arifos-local._use_when: You want arifOS running on your own machine, no network dependency.

arifos-docker._comment: Docker container. Run the official image locally.
arifos-docker._use_when: You want isolated execution without polluting your Python environment.

arifos-dev._comment: Developer mode — from cloned repo with venv.
arifos-dev._use_when: You cloned the repo and want to hack on arifOS itself.
